content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on the left side of the track but all wheels are on track.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 41 + 5 = 46
Waypoint 46: (5.7798, 2.7708)
Car position: (6.5476, 2.4656)
Bearing = atan2(2.7708 - 2.4656, 5.7798 - 6.5476) = atan2(0.3052, -0.7678)
= 180 - atan2(0.3052, 0.7678) = 180 - 21.67° = 158.33°
Current heading: 133.59°
Delta = 158.33 - 133.59 = 24.74° → left (positive)
